title: ulex micranthus
intro: Ulex micranthus, also known as the dwarf gorse, is a shrub in the genus Ulex, native to the southwestern regions of Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Ulex micranthus include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant properties. Ulex micranthus is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts are also used in various pharmaceutical and cosmetic applications.
